stories.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
stories.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.

stories.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
stories.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

stories.title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
stories.summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.

stories.title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
stories.summary: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

stories.title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
stories.summary: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.

stories.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
stories.summary: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
stories.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

stories.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
stories.summary: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

stories.title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
stories.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.

stories.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
stories.summary: A historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.

stories.title: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
stories.summary: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

stories.title: Private payrolls rose by 98,000 in June, less than expected, ADP reports
stories.summary: Companies added slightly fewer workers than forecast, with hiring targeted heavily toward healthcare-related sectors.

stories.title: ULA's last six Atlas Vs can't launch anything besides Boeing's Starliner
stories.summary: Amazon says it has enough satellites in orbit to begin initial broadband service at mid-latitudes later this year.

stories.title: How AI could enable autonomous robot workers in workplaces—and maybe homes
stories.summary: Top robotics researchers and founders explain how robot autonomy is evolving.

stories.title: FCC to end Biden-era rule that forces ISPs to list all their fees
stories.summary: FCC to let ISPs stop listing all passthrough fees, give single "up to" price.

stories.title: Kremlin suspected of flying drones over Europe using Russian shadow fleet
stories.summary: Drone intruders that possibly flew from Russian ships showed Europe isn’t ready.

stories.title: What is the oldest American object ever launched into space?
stories.summary: From a Revolutionary War flag to the Statue of Liberty...

stories.title: NRC is (sort of) getting rid of "as low as reasonably achievable" standard
stories.summary: Its issues with current nuclear safety standards are termed semantic, not physical.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: Has Bitcoin bottomed for this cycle? Analysts say 'not yet'
stories.summary: Some Bitcoin analysts point to a deeper downside risk, while others believes they can see the early signs of a recovery.

stories.title: Bitcoin nears cycle bottom as over half of supply is held at a loss, says K33
stories.summary: K33 said Bitcoin has historically bottomed within weeks of more than half of its circulating supply being held at a loss, with strong one-year returns following in most previous cycles.

stories.title: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
stories.summary: The European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for further assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs after MiCA’s transition period ended.

stories.title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
stories.summary: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.

stories.title: Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
stories.summary: The move follows a June 23 exploit that has now resulted in closing down the wallet, with users urged to withdraw their assets before all functions are disabled on Aug. 3, 2026.

stories.title: NASA's Hubble spots a stellar sparkler for the Fourth of July

stories.summary: Researchers have uncovered an unexpected antiviral defense system in sea anemones that works very differently from the one humans use. The discovery suggests evolution developed multiple ways to combat viruses, challengi

stories.title: Scientists discover why some brains resist Alzheimer's
stories.summary: Some brains appear to fight back against Alzheimer's by helping immature brain cells survive damage instead of succumbing to it. Understanding this natural resilience could point researchers toward entirely new ways

stories.title: BTS take credit for England football win in first UK show since 2019
stories.summary: The pop group claim they're a good luck charm for the England team, as they return to London.

stories.title: 9.1m watch England's epic win over Mexico
stories.summary: A peak audience of 9.1 million tuned in overnight to watch England beat Mexico to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup.

stories.title: Patrice Lawrence named new children's laureate
stories.summary: Brighton-born Patrice Lawrence will be the main representative of children's literature until 2028.

stories.title: Party Rock Anthem singer Lauren Bennett dies aged 36
stories.summary: Bennett's cause of death was not immediately clear and bandmates from her former group G.R.L say their "hearts are broken".

stories.title: Top Boy actor tells rape trial that encounter was consensual
stories.summary: Micheal Ward, who denies the charges, tells a jury he thought they were "having a great time".

stories.title: Wolf Alice cover Nirvana at emotional homecoming show
stories.summary: The band break out their own version of Smells Like Teen Spirit at their biggest-ever headline show.
